title: urticastrum milnei
intro: Urticastrum milnei, also known as the New Zealand nettle tree or stinging tree, is a plant species in the Urticaceae family, characterized by its stinging hairs and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Urticastrum milnei include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine properties, which make it useful for treating skin conditions, wounds, and allergic reactions. The health benefits of Urticastrum milnei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and provide relief from allergies and respiratory issues, such as asthma. Urticastrum milnei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
